instruction: A sample of 30 dentists from Seattle is taken to estimate the median income of all Seattle residents. Is this study [ANS] A. REPRESENTATIVE?  B. NON-REPRESENTATIVE? A simple random sample of men over age 18 is taken to estimate the mean weight of all adult males. Is this study [ANS] A. REPRESENTATIVE?  B. NON-REPRESENTATIVE? A telephone survey is conducted during the day in order to determine the chances of a certain candidate winning an election. Is this study [ANS] A. REPRESENTATIVE?  B. NON-REPRESENTATIVE? A simple random sample of 40 U.S. citizens is taken in order to estimate the mean cholesterol level of U.S. citizens. Is this study [ANS] A. REPRESENTATIVE?  B. NON-REPRESENTATIVE?
